message.content:
@startuml
participant Alice
participant Bob
participant User
participant A
participant B
participant C

Alice -> Bob : Authentication Request
Bob --> Alice : Authentication Response
Alice -> Bob : Another authentication Request
Bob --> Alice : another authentication Response

User -> A : DoWork
activate A
A -> B : «createRequest»
activate B
B -> C : DoWork
activate C
C --> B : WorkDone
destroy C
B --> A : RequestCreated
deactivate B
A --> User : Done
deactivate A

@enduml
